message:
Consolidate 4 parallel src-position arrays into DocSrcPos struct

Replace doc_src_positions/cap/len/built parallel arrays with a single
doc_src[MAX_DOC_SLOTS] array of DocSrcPos structs. Use local sp pointer
in buildDocSrcPositions and doc_get_src_pos for shorter field access.
Error path in buildDocSrcPositions now uses sp.* = .{} to reset all
fields at once.
